title: Dry Bulk Spot Chartering Activity Falls Back Down To Earth
section_path: Dry Bulk Spot Chartering Activity Falls Back Down To Earth
section_path_text: Dry Bulk Spot Chartering Activity Falls Back Down To Earth
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
As we discussed in Commodore Research's most recent Weekly Executive Report, It remains to be seen what comes next with the war in Iran and related dry bulk spot chartering activity. For now, an intense desire to bring in more cargoes (as seen two weeks ago) has subsided. On the vessel supply side, the fleet continues to grow by a moderate amount, and overall dry bulk trade volume still needs to continue to grow this year to offset moderate fleet growth.
